observations.archetype_gloss: Represents the dark, disillusioned aspect of the father figure, embodying bitterness and lost dreams
observations.summary: Aviel projects his bitterness and disillusionment onto his son, condemning the mother as a fool and dreamer, reflecting his own shadow aspects of despair and failed aspirations.

evidence.quote: "No." Aviel's voice rose. "You want to know what your mother was, boy? She was a fool. A dreamer who thought she could fly to the stars, who thought the mud and shit of earthly life was beneath her." His lips pulled back from his teeth in something that might have been a smile or might have been a snarl. "And where is she now? Where did all her reaching get her?"

accepted_observations.summary: Aviel projects his bitterness and disillusionment onto his son, condemning the mother as a fool and dreamer, reflecting his own shadow aspects of despair and failed aspirations.
